creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
Hi,

I am using nextcloudclient-0.0.0.20180323_2 on 11.2-RELEASE-p2, under xfce-4.12_1 with gnome-keyring-3.18.3_5 (all built with my own poudriere). A month or so ago, after some `pkg upgrade', nextcloudclient started to ask me for password before gnome-keyring, instead of calling gnome-keyring, waiting for me to unlock it, and authenticate from there. gnome-keyring asks me for password the moment after I log into nextcloudclient, which is pointless as its only purpose for me is nextcloud authentication.

Any idea how to solve this, besides uninstalling gnome-keyring and revert to authenticate to nextcloud directly?

Thank you in advance.
